creator: paulbeard@gmail.com
text:
Within a few minutes of sending this PR, the problem went away â partly.
The error messages are still displayed but the files are correctly output
with fonts. Example:
http://www.paulbeard.org/metrics/shuttle_XPC_gt_29_123.html If this still
has hollow block placeholders instead of text, it's still broken. That page
is a static version of a page that is correctly generated dynamically.
databases/rrdtool is where this presents itself, through net-mgmt/cacti.


On Sun, Nov 10, 2013 at 4:40 PM, <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/183856'.
